title: azalea viscosa var. montana
intro: Azalea viscosa var. montana, also known as the sticky azalea or mountain sticky azalea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Azalea viscosa var. montana include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Azalea viscosa var. montana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
